headline: APA Corporation Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates Despite Weak Prices
summary: APA tops Q4 estimates with 91 cents EPS on strong output and lower costs, even as weak oil and gas prices dent revenues.

raw.headline: APA Corporation Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates Despite Weak Prices
raw.summary: APA tops Q4 estimates with 91 cents EPS on strong output and lower costs, even as weak oil and gas prices dent revenues.

headline: 3 Natural Gas Stocks to Gain on Mounting Clean Energy Demand
summary: Rising clean energy demand and higher U.S. LNG exports are lifting natural gas prices, setting up EQT for stronger cash flows ahead.

raw.headline: 3 Natural Gas Stocks to Gain on Mounting Clean Energy Demand
raw.summary: Rising clean energy demand and higher U.S. LNG exports are lifting natural gas prices, setting up EQT for stronger cash flows ahead.

headline: Middle East war sends natural gas prices soaring, raising growth shock risk for Europe and Asia
summary: Disruption to LNG supplies could dent European growth and harm reindustrialization ambitions.

raw.headline: Middle East war sends natural gas prices soaring, raising growth shock risk for Europe and Asia
raw.summary: Disruption to LNG supplies could dent European growth and harm reindustrialization ambitions.
